name: Mrs Fields Peanut Butter Chocolate Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush cookies until finely ground. Add melted butter and mix.
2. Press the crumb mixture into the bottom of an 8x8 baking pan and bake at 325°F for 10 minutes. Cool to room temperature.
3. Melt chocolate. Pour half into the pan and spread evenly over the crust. Place in refrigerator. Keep remaining chocolate warm.
4. Blend peanut butter and softened butter together until smooth using an electric mixer. Slowly beat in confectioners' sugar and vanilla. Beat until smooth.
5. Spread mixture over chilled chocolate layer. Pour remaining warm chocolate over top and spread smoothly.
6. Chill in the refrigerator for one hour. Yields 24-36 bars.
